import ctypes, ctypes.wintypes, time

user32 = ctypes.windll.user32
kernel32 = ctypes.windll.kernel32

TH32CS_SNAPPROCESS = 0x2
class PE32\(ctypes.Structure\):
    _fields_ = [\('dwSize', ctypes.wintypes.DWORD\),\('cntUsage', ctypes.wintypes.DWORD\),
                \('th32ProcessID', ctypes.wintypes.DWORD\),\('th32DefaultHeapID', ctypes.POINTER\(ctypes.c_ulong\)\),
                \('th32ModuleID', ctypes.wintypes.DWORD\),\('cntThreads', ctypes.wintypes.DWORD\),
                \('th32ParentProcessID', ctypes.wintypes.DWORD\),\('pcPriClassBase', ctypes.c_long\),
                \('dwFlags', ctypes.wintypes.DWORD\),\('szExeFile', ctypes.c_char * 260\)]

WNDENUMPROC = ctypes.WINFUNCTYPE\(ctypes.c_bool, ctypes.wintypes.HWND, ctypes.wintypes.LPARAM\)

def get_sam_pids\(\):
    snap = kernel32.CreateToolhelp32Snapshot\(TH32CS_SNAPPROCESS, 0\)
    pe = PE32\(\); pe.dwSize = ctypes.sizeof\(pe\)
    pids = []
    if kernel32.Process32First\(snap, ctypes.byref\(pe\)\):
        while True:
            if b'sam.picker' in pe.szExeFile.lower\(\):
                pids.append\(pe.th32ProcessID\)
            if not kernel32.Process32Next\(snap, ctypes.byref\(pe\)\):
                break
    kernel32.CloseHandle\(snap\)
    return pids

def dump_windows\(pid\):
    pid_buf = ctypes.wintypes.DWORD\(\)
    buf = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer\(256\)
    cls = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer\(256\)
    class RECT\(ctypes.Structure\):
        _fields_ = [\('left',ctypes.c_long\),\('top',ctypes.c_long\),\('right',ctypes.c_long\),\('bottom',ctypes.c_long\)]
    
    wins = []
    def cb\(hwnd, _\):
        user32.GetWindowThreadProcessId\(hwnd, ctypes.byref\(pid_buf\)\)
        if pid_buf.value == pid:
            user32.GetWindowTextW\(hwnd, buf, 256\)
            user32.GetClassNameW\(hwnd, cls, 256\)
            r = RECT\(\)
            user32.GetWindowRect\(hwnd, ctypes.byref\(r\)\)
            vis = user32.IsWindowVisible\(hwnd\)
            wins.append\(\(hwnd, buf.value, cls.value, r.left, r.top, r.right, r.bottom, vis\)\)
        return True
    user32.EnumWindows\(WNDENUMPROC\(cb\), 0\)
    return wins

print\('Жду 10с — открой диалог ошибки...'\)
for i in range\(20\):
    time.sleep\(0.5\)
    pids = get_sam_pids\(\)
    for pid in pids:
        wins = dump_windows\(pid\)
        if len\(wins\) > 1:  # больше одного окна = есть диалог
            print\(f'=== Найдено {len\(wins\)} окон PID={pid} ==='\)
            for w in wins:
                hwnd, title, cls, l, t, r, b, vis = w
                print\(f'  hwnd={hwnd} vis={vis} [{l},{t},{r},{b}] class={cls!r} title={title!r}'\)
            break
print\('Готово'\)
" 2>&1)

import ctypes, ctypes.wintypes, time

user32 = ctypes.windll.user32
WNDENUMPROC = ctypes.WINFUNCTYPE\(ctypes.c_bool, ctypes.wintypes.HWND, ctypes.wintypes.LPARAM\)

# Находим главное окно Picker
main_hwnd = user32.FindWindowW\('WindowsForms10.Window.8.app.0.141b42a_r7_ad1', None\)
print\(f'Главное окно Picker: hwnd={main_hwnd}'\)

class RECT\(ctypes.Structure\):
    _fields_ = [\('left',ctypes.c_long\),\('top',ctypes.c_long\),\('right',ctypes.c_long\),\('bottom',ctypes.c_long\)]

def get_children\(hwnd\):
    result = []
    buf = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer\(256\)
    cls = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer\(256\)
    def cb\(child, _\):
        if user32.IsWindowVisible\(child\):
            user32.GetWindowTextW\(child, buf, 256\)
            user32.GetClassNameW\(child, cls, 256\)
            r = RECT\(\)
            user32.GetWindowRect\(child, ctypes.byref\(r\)\)
            result.append\(\(child, cls.value, buf.value, r.left, r.top, r.right, r.bottom\)\)
        return True
    user32.EnumChildWindows\(hwnd, WNDENUMPROC\(cb\), 0\)
    return result

print\('Жду 15с — введи плохой ID \(например 8230\) и нажми Add...'\)
prev_count = 0
for i in range\(30\):
    time.sleep\(0.5\)
    children = get_children\(main_hwnd\)
    if len\(children\) != prev_count:
        print\(f'--- [{i*0.5:.1f}с] Изменение: {prev_count} -> {len\(children\)} видимых дочерних контролов ---'\)
        for c in children:
            print\(f'  hwnd={c[0]} [{c[3]},{c[4]},{c[5]},{c[6]}] class={c[1]!r} text={c[2]!r}'\)
        prev_count = len\(children\)
print\('Готово'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Deniz\\Downloads\\projects\\pet_project\\steam_helper" && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import ctypes, ctypes.wintypes, time

user32 = ctypes.windll.user32
WNDENUMPROC = ctypes.WINFUNCTYPE\(ctypes.c_bool, ctypes.wintypes.HWND, ctypes.wintypes.LPARAM\)

buf = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer\(512\)
cls = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer\(256\)

class RECT\(ctypes.Structure\):
    _fields_ = [\('left',ctypes.c_long\),\('top',ctypes.c_long\),\('right',ctypes.c_long\),\('bottom',ctypes.c_long\)]

def get_all_visible\(\):
    wins = {}
    def cb\(hwnd, _\):
        if user32.IsWindowVisible\(hwnd\):
            user32.GetWindowTextW\(hwnd, buf, 512\)
            user32.GetClassNameW\(hwnd, cls, 256\)
            r = RECT\(\)
            user32.GetWindowRect\(hwnd, ctypes.byref\(r\)\)
            pid = ctypes.wintypes.DWORD\(\)
            user32.GetWindowThreadProcessId\(hwnd, ctypes.byref\(pid\)\)
            wins[hwnd] = \(cls.value, buf.value, pid.value, r.left, r.top, r.right, r.bottom\)
        return True
    user32.EnumWindows\(WNDENUMPROC\(cb\), 0\)
    return wins

baseline = get_all_visible\(\)
print\(f'Базовое состояние: {len\(baseline\)} видимых окон'\)
print\('ЗАПУСКАЙ АВТОМАТИЗАЦИЮ НА ПЛОХОМ ID! Жду 30с...'\)

for i in range\(300\):
    time.sleep\(0.1\)
    current = get_all_visible\(\)
    new = {h: v for h, v in current.items\(\) if h not in baseline}
    gone = {h: v for h, v in baseline.items\(\) if h not in current}
    if new:
        t = i * 0.1
        print\(f'[{t:.1f}с] НОВЫЕ ОКНА:'\)
        for h, \(c, title, pid, l, top, r, b\) in new.items\(\):
            print\(f'  hwnd={h} pid={pid} [{l},{top},{r},{b}] class={c!r} title={title!r}'\)
    if gone:
        for h, \(c, title, pid, l, top, r, b\) in gone.items\(\):
            print\(f'[{i*0.1:.1f}с] ЗАКРЫТО: hwnd={h} title={title!r}'\)
    baseline = current
print\('Готово'\)
" 2>&1)

import struct, sys

path = r'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\appcache\\packageinfo.vdf'
with open\(path, 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)

print\(f'Размер файла: {len\(data\):,} байт'\)
print\(f'Первые 8 байт \(hex\): {data[:8].hex\(\)}'\)
print\(f'Первые 8 байт \(raw\): {data[:8]}'\)

# Заголовок: magic + version
magic = struct.unpack_from\('<I', data, 0\)[0]
version = struct.unpack_from\('<I', data, 4\)[0]
print\(f'Magic: 0x{magic:08x}'\)
print\(f'Version: 0x{version:08x}'\)
" 2>&1)

from steam.utils.appcache import parse_packageinfo
path = r'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\appcache\\packageinfo.vdf'

    header, pkgs_iter = parse_packageinfo\(f\)

# Берём первые 3 пакета чтобы понять структуру

    print\(f'--- Пакет {i} ---'\)
    print\(f'  Ключи: {list\(pkg.keys\(\)\)}'\)
    inner = pkg.get\(list\(pkg.keys\(\)\)[0], {}\) if pkg else {}
    print\(f'  Содержимое \(первый ключ\): {list\(inner.keys\(\)\)[:10] if isinstance\(inner, dict\) else inner}'\)
    if i >= 2:
        break

from steam.utils.appcache import parse_packageinfo
path = r'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\appcache\\packageinfo.vdf'

with open\(path, 'rb'\) as f:
    header, pkgs_iter = parse_packageinfo\(f\)
    count = 0
    for pkg in pkgs_iter:
        if count < 3:
            pkg_id = list\(pkg.keys\(\)\)[0]
            inner = pkg[pkg_id]
            print\(f'--- Package ID: {pkg_id} ---'\)
            print\(f'  Ключи: {list\(inner.keys\(\)\)[:10]}'\)
            if 'appids' in inner:
                print\(f'  appids: {list\(inner[\\"appids\\"].values\(\)\)[:10]}'\)
        count += 1

print\(f'Всего пакетов: {count}'\)

import vdf
with open\(r'C:\\Users\\Deniz\\AppData\\Local\\Steam\\local.vdf', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\) as f:
    data = vdf.load\(f\)

def walk\(d, depth=0, max_depth=4\):
    if depth > max_depth: return
    if isinstance\(d, dict\):
        for k in list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:30]:
            print\('  ' * depth + repr\(k\)\)
            walk\(d[k], depth+1, max_depth\)
    else:
        print\('  ' * depth + repr\(str\(d\)[:80]\)\)

walk\(data\)
" 2>&1)

import urllib.request, json

# Steam локальный IPC сервер
for port in [27060, 27360]:
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen\(f'http://localhost:{port}/', timeout=2\) as r:
            print\(f'Порт {port}: статус {r.status}'\)
            print\(r.read\(\)[:200]\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Порт {port}: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
